title: Build a full-stack task manager application with a Flask bac…
current_goal: Build a full-stack task manager application with a Flask backend in backend/app.py exposing REST endpoints (/tasks GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) using SQLite via SQLAlchemy in backend/db/models.py, a config system in config/settings.py defining database URI and server port, and a vanilla JS frontend with index.html in frontend/ and app.js in frontend/src/ that fetches data using fetch(api_base + route) and renders tasks with add/edit/delete functionality; enforce that frontend uses IDs (task-input, add-btn, task-list) and that all API calls use http://localhost:5000
